ddls:
CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "geoid" TEXT /* Geographic identifier for census tract */,
  "median_household_income" REAL /* Median income of households in the neighborhood */,
  "median_home_value" REAL /* Median value of homes in the neighborhood */,
  "per_capita_income" REAL /* Per capita income in the neighborhood */,
  "geometry" TEXT /* Geospatial geometry representing the neighborhood boundaries */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density per square kilometer */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the neighborhood in square kilometers */,
  "boundary_year" INTEGER /* Year the neighborhood boundaries were established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_categories" (
  "income_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income category */,
  "income_range" TEXT /* Income range represented as a string */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the income category */,
  "min_income" REAL /* Minimum income for the category */,
  "max_income" REAL /* Maximum income for the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "home_values" (
  "home_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each home value category */,
  "value_range" TEXT /* Home value range represented as a string */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the home value category */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum home value for the category */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum home value for the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("home_value_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator (e.g., unemployment rate) */,
  "indicator_value" REAL /* Value of the indicator for the specified year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the indicator is relevant */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the economic indicator data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "census_data" (
  "census_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each census record */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the neighborhood associated with the data */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population in the neighborhood */,
  "household_size" REAL /* Average household size */,
  "racial_diversity_index" REAL /* Index indicating the racial diversity within the neighborhood */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of age groups in the neighborhood */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the population in the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("census_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_census_data_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property sale */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the neighborhood where the property is located */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Sale price of the property */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the property sale */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., single-family home, condo) */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms */,
  "sq_footage" INTEGER /* Square footage of the property */,
  "lot_size" REAL /* Size of the lot in square feet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_sales_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., urban planner, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user accessing the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was accessed */,
  "accessed_table" TEXT /* Name of the table accessed by the user */,
  "action_performed" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., economic overview, housing market analysis) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhood_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the neighborhood where the service is located */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service (e.g., library, community center) */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service (e.g., public, private) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the service */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the service */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neighborhood_services_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transportation" (
  "transportation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transportation facility */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the neighborhood where the facility is located */,
  "transportation_type" TEXT /* Type of transportation (e.g., bus stop, metro station) */,
  "accessibility_rating" REAL /* Accessibility rating of the facility */,
  "routes" TEXT /* Routes served by the transportation facility */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the transportation service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transportation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transportation_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "land_use" (
  "land_use_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each land use designation */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the neighborhood associated with the designation */,
  "use_type" TEXT /* Type of land use (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "zoning_code" TEXT /* Zoning code that applies to the land use */,
  "density" REAL /* Density of the land use (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("land_use_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_land_use_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_statistics" (
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime statistic */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the neighborhood associated with the crime statistic */,
  "crime_type" TEXT /* Type of crime (e.g., violent, property) */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate for the neighborhood */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the crime statistic is relevant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_statistics_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "businesses" (
  "business_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the neighborhood where the business is located */,
  "business_name" TEXT /* Name of the business */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the business */,
  "employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Annual revenue of the business */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_businesses_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhood_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the neighborhood where the event is happening */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., festival, concert, meeting) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neighborhood_events_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)
